title: Add pwa service to docker-compose
userStory: As an operator, I want the PWA running in compose so that it shares the docker network with Graphiti and Postgres.
acceptanceCriteria: compose/docker-compose.yml adds a pwa service: build ../pwa, env DATABASE_URL, GRAPHITI_URL=http://graphiti:8000, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, PWA_BEARER_TOKEN
Verify: docker compose up -d pwa; container healthy; reachable internally from caddy container
